proposed_relations.description: B44 Limited service is explicitly stated to become B44 SBS on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before

rationale: Observation base_record_id 'route_b44-sbs' already matches the existing canonical registry record 'route_b44-sbs', which covers B44 Select Bus Service on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor with payload route_type=select_bus_service, borough=Brooklyn. The record alias 'route_b44-sbs-2010-proposed' and source '2010_05_17_brt_nostrand_cb15' already subsume this observation. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — no cross-record link is required.

proposed_relations.description: The Nostrand/Rogers SBS proposal (2010, Phase I BRT corridor) is the planning-phase predecessor of the B44 SBS implementation (completed November 2013), which is described as the 'Fifth and final Phase I SBS route'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This map illustrates the Phase I BRT Corridors in New York City and its surrounding regions. The map is color-coded to show different types of projects: blue lines represent 'Implemented SBS Projects', and red lines represent 'Phase I SBS Projects'.

rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs' already exists as a canonical registry record with matching payload (same project_name 'Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service', same project_type 'Select Bus Service', same borough 'Brooklyn', same description about converting B44 Limited to SBS on 9.3-mile corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay). Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id.

9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before

rationale: Observation's base_record_id (corridor_nostrand-avenue) matches the existing registry record. The observation already resolves to that canonical record — the 9.3-mile Nostrand/Rogers SBS corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, served by B44 in Brooklyn, with streets Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
Currently served by B44 bus route

The map illustrates the Nostrand Ave Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) route, which runs parallel to the Nostrand Avenue corridor. The route is divided into two main sections: the Northbound section on Rogers Avenue and the Southbound section on Nostrand Avenue.

proposed_relations.description: Rogers Avenue is the northbound SBS section of the broader Nostrand/Rogers corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the Nostrand Ave Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) route, which runs parallel to the Nostrand Avenue corridor. The route is divided into two main sections: the Northbound section on Rogers Avenue and the Southbound section on Nostrand Avenue.

rationale: Observation's base_record_id (corridor_rogers-avenue) matches the existing registry record.
